Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Grants retirement service credit in the New York state and local retirement system to Jeffrey M. Hogan for service as a Utica firefighter
Summary: Grants retirement service credit in the New York state and local retirement system to Jeffrey M. Hogan for service as a Utica firefighter from 3/24/2007 -- 1/3/2013.
ActClause: AN ACT to authorize the granting of retirement service credit in the New York state and local retirement system to Jeffrey M. Hogan for service as a Utica firefighter
